Cody is pulled into a glass conference room where HR tries to reduce him to a clean termination case, with Reed present as witness. Cody refuses to sign, clears his father, and forces the company to deal with the messier truth of what he actually did.

Katiya apologizes for hiding Rayna, explains what is coming, and demands an audience with Aldrin. Aryn cuffs herself to Katiya and chooses to help her force a path through a system that refuses to listen.

Upper management asks for Cody by name, forcing Aerospace and HR into conflict over whether he is a liability or an asset. Reed becomes Cody's reluctant way up the tower, using his access to move him toward Aspen while Security tries to shut the route down.

Katiya and Aryn fight their way across the base until Erik blocks the last path to Aldrin. Katiya convinces him to let her go, and the choice costs him as much as it frees her. Katiya tackles Aldrin over his desk with the sphere and warps him to the site of the coming attack.
Cody reaches Aspen and is finally allowed to present, pulled between the company that wants him contained and the people who want to hear him speak.
